Class Order

java.lang.Object
Order
public class Order extends Object
Represents a row to be inserted into the Orders table. Contains the following elements
  • Unique order id (this is received from the database)
  • Employee id of th employee placing the order
  • Total sales by aggregating all related items and toppings in the order
  • List of the Order items

    • insertOrder

      public void insertOrder(Connection connection)
      Inserts element into the Orders table. Prompts its related items to also be inserted into its respective table.
      Parameters:
      connection -
